title: Seplat Energy Achieves Exceptional Year with Zero Accidents, Reinforces Commitment To Growth & Sustainability - FinancialEDGE
description: Seplat Energy's Chairman, Senator Udoma Udo Udoma, announced that 2024 was an exceptional financial year for the company, marked by a remarkable achievement of zero accidents during the period. Udoma who addressed shareholders of the company at its 12th Annual General Meeting (AGM) in Lagos, explained that this milestone underscores the company's dedication to safety,
html: Seplat Energy’s  Chairman, Senator Udoma Udo Udoma, announced that 2024 was an exceptional financial year for the company, marked by a remarkable achievement of zero accidents during the period.
